mapper.insert:
insert into main.t_service_node(service_iddocker_idcontainer_idcontainer_nameport_mapport_webmax_cpu) values
(#{entity.serviceId}#{entity.dockerId}#{entity.containerId}#{entity.containerName}#{entity.portMap}#{entity.portWeb}#{entity.maxCpu})
on duplicate key update service_id = values(service_id) docker_id = values(docker_id) container_id = values(container_id) container_name = values(container_name) port_map = values(port_map) port_web = values(port_web) max_cpu = values(max_cpu)
mapper.select:
SELECT u.name unit_name, sg.name service_group_name, sg.id service_group_id, d.name docker_name, d.ip docker_ip, s.alias service_alias, s.name service_name, n.* from t_service_node n,t_server_docker d,t_service s,t_unit u,t_service_group sg WHERE n.docker_id = d.id and s.unit_id = u.id and s.group_id = sg.id and n.service_id = s.id
and u.name like '%'||#{unitName}||'%'
and sg.id = #{serviceGroupId}
and s.alias like '%'||#{serviceAlias}||'%'
SELECT service_id, count( 1 ) AS num FROM t_service_node GROUP BY service_id
